paper_title: Field and Laboratory Experiments with EDE Protect-It

methods.method_name: Field and Laboratory Experiments with EDE Protect-It in China
methods.description: This method evaluates the effectiveness of Protect-It under field and laboratory conditions in Sichuan and Guangdong provinces, China, using three stored-grain insect pests in paddy rice and wheat.

steps.description: The tests were conducted using three stored-grain insect pests in paddy rice and wheat.
steps.searchable_summary: select insect pests for testing in grain storage

steps.description: Test grains were selected with specific moisture content for the experiments.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare test grains with specified moisture content

steps.description: Bioassay results demonstrated residual activity of Protect-It and compared its efficacy to fenitrothion.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze bioassay results for insect mortality

methods.method_name: Insect Control on Stored Malting Barley with Diatomaceous Earth
methods.description: This method involves a field test using diatomaceous earth (DE) to control insects on stored malting barley in Southern Brazil.

steps.description: DE was applied over the malting barley on the conveyor belt as a dust and as a slurry.
steps.searchable_summary: apply DE to malting barley as dust and slurry

steps.description: Evaluate insect populations on treated and untreated barley.
steps.searchable_summary: compare insect populations on treated vs untreated barley

methods.method_name: Layer Treatment with DE in Canada
methods.description: This method evaluates the efficacy of DE Protect-It applied as a surface layer treatment of Hard Red Spring wheat against insect species and determines the optimum dilution ratio to mitigate adverse effects on grain bulk density.

steps.description: Apply DE Protect-It as a surface layer treatment at different concentrations and layer thicknesses.
steps.searchable_summary: apply DE Protect-It as surface layer treatment

steps.description: Evaluate the reduction in insect populations and the impact on grain bulk density.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze insect population reduction and bulk density impact

methods.method_name: Application of DE Protect-It to Empty Grain Bins
methods.description: This method determines the efficacy of Protect-It against grain insects when applied to empty farm bins at different rates.

steps.description: Apply Protect-It to empty grain bins at specified rates.
steps.searchable_summary: apply Protect-It to empty grain bins

steps.description: Compare insect mortality in treated and untreated cages.
steps.searchable_summary: compare insect mortality in treated vs untreated conditions

methods.method_name: Combination of Cooling with Surface Application of DE
methods.description: This method examines the combination of cooling with DE surface application to control insects in grain storage.

steps.description: Apply DE to grain surface and supplement with cooling.
steps.searchable_summary: apply DE to grain surface and use cooling

steps.description: Evaluate insect control effectiveness after DE and cooling treatment.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze effectiveness of DE and cooling on insect control
